# `catalog_review.json` Schema

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_schema_docs.py; do not edit by hand. -->

`catalog_review.json` is the Agent-filled data-asset inventory for one archived paper. The template and accepted fields come from the Pydantic model; the Agent fills only paper-grounded semantic blanks such as table roles, column meanings, evidence, and comments.

Use `schema_version: "stella.article_data_assets.review.v0.1"`.

## Required Top-Level Fields

- `schema_version`
- `paper`
- `source`
- `review`
- `internal_tables`
- `external_resources`

## Top-Level Shape

```json
{
  "schema_version": "stella.article_data_assets.review.v0.1",
  "paper": {},
  "source": {},
  "review": {},
  "internal_tables": [],
  "external_resources": []
}
```

## Enum Values

- `needs_review`
- `partial`
- `reviewed`
- `source_missing`
- `stella.article_data_assets.review.v0.1`

## Workflow Notes

- Generate a skeleton with `scripts/init_catalog_review.py --arxiv-id <arxiv_id>` before Agent filling.
- Do not add fields outside the generated schema; validators reject undeclared keys.
- Use `scripts/validate_catalog_review.py --require-complete` for final Agent-filled output; plain validation only checks structural skeleton validity.
- This stage does not convert tables to ECSV and does not decide HVS candidate inclusion.

```json
{
  "$defs": {
    "ExternalResource": {
      "additionalProperties": false,

        "id": {
          "title": "Id",
          "type": "string"

        "kind": {
          "title": "Kind",

          "title": "Url",
          "type": "string"

          "title": "Local Path",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "description": {
          "title": "Description",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "source_refs": {
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/ExternalResourceSourceRef"
          },
          "title": "Source Refs",
          "type": "array"
        },
        "evidence": {
          "title": "Evidence",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "comments": {
          "title": "Comments",
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "id",
        "kind",
        "url",
        "local_path",
        "description",
        "source_refs",
        "evidence",
        "comments"
      ],
      "title": "ExternalResource",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ExternalResourceSourceRef": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "path": {
          "title": "Path",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "start_line": {
          "title": "Start Line",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "end_line": {
          "title": "End Line",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "context": {
          "title": "Context",
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "path",
        "start_line",
        "end_line",
        "context"
      ],
      "title": "ExternalResourceSourceRef",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "InternalTable": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "title": "Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "kind": {
          "title": "Kind",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "asset_type": {
          "title": "Asset Type",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "role_in_paper": {
          "title": "Role In Paper",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "source_refs": {
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/ReviewTableSourceRef"
          },
          "title": "Source Refs",
          "type": "array"
        },
        "columns": {
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/ReviewColumn"
          },
          "title": "Columns",
          "type": "array"
        },
        "evidence": {
          "title": "Evidence",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "comments": {
          "title": "Comments",
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "id",
        "kind",
        "asset_type",
        "role_in_paper",
        "source_refs",
        "columns",
        "evidence",
        "comments"
      ],
      "title": "InternalTable",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "LinkSet": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "abs": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Abs",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "pdf": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Pdf",
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "title": "LinkSet",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ReviewColumn": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "name": {
          "title": "Name",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "meaning": {
          "title": "Meaning",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "unit_text": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Unit Text",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "source_of_definition": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Source Of Definition",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "confidence": {
          "default": 0.0,
          "title": "Confidence",
          "type": "number"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "name",
        "meaning"
      ],
      "title": "ReviewColumn",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ReviewMeta": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "status": {
          "enum": [
            "reviewed",
            "partial",
            "needs_review",
            "source_missing"
          ],
          "title": "Status",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "reviewed_at": {
          "title": "Reviewed At",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "reviewer": {
          "title": "Reviewer",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "summary": {
          "title": "Summary",
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "status",
        "reviewed_at",
        "reviewer",
        "summary"
      ],
      "title": "ReviewMeta",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ReviewPaper": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "arxiv_id": {
          "title": "Arxiv Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "title": {
          "title": "Title",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "month": {
          "title": "Month",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "source_note_json": {
          "title": "Source Note Json",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "links": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/LinkSet"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "arxiv_id",
        "title",
        "month",
        "source_note_json",
        "links"
      ],
      "title": "ReviewPaper",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ReviewSource": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "paper_dir": {
          "title": "Paper Dir",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "audit_path": {
          "title": "Audit Path",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "source_dir": {
          "title": "Source Dir",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "tex_root": {
          "title": "Tex Root",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "source_available": {
          "title": "Source Available",
          "type": "boolean"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "paper_dir",
        "audit_path",
        "source_dir",
        "tex_root",
        "source_available"
      ],
      "title": "ReviewSource",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "ReviewTableSourceRef": {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "path": {
          "title": "Path",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "start_line": {
          "title": "Start Line",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "end_line": {
          "title": "End Line",
          "type": "integer"
        },
        "caption": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Caption",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "label": {
          "default": "",
          "title": "Label",
          "type": "string"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "path",
        "start_line",
        "end_line"
      ],
      "title": "ReviewTableSourceRef",
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "properties": {
    "schema_version": {
      "const": "stella.article_data_assets.review.v0.1",
      "title": "Schema Version",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "paper": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/ReviewPaper"
    },
    "source": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/ReviewSource"
    },
    "review": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/ReviewMeta"
    },
    "internal_tables": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/InternalTable"
      },
      "title": "Internal Tables",
      "type": "array"
    },
    "external_resources": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/ExternalResource"
      },
      "title": "External Resources",
      "type": "array"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "schema_version",
    "paper",
    "source",
    "review",
    "internal_tables",
    "external_resources"
  ],
  "title": "CatalogReviewRecord",
  "type": "object"
}
```
